category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU Emacs as a text editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage identify GNU Emacs.
docs_sources: Official GNU Emacs website provides documentation and manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official GNU Emacs source-control repository is hosted on GNU Savannah Git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states GNU Emacs text editor; Emacs is the GNU extensible editor with Emacs Lisp customization.
